creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #311)

For reference, now that there are 2 vmcore.* files for
the adjusted kernel recording context:

vmcore.7 :
*(modlist_t) 0xfffff800036f00c0 shows:
 {link = {tqe_next = 0xfffff80000000007, tqe_prev = 0xfffff8000471e980}, container = 0xfffff80004ad6c00, name = 0xffffffff829ef000 "amdgpu_raven_me_bin_fw", version = 1}

vmcore.8 :
*(modlist_t) 0xfffff800039fbc00 shows:
{link = {tqe_next = 0xfffff80000000007, tqe_prev = 0xfffff80003907100}, container = 0xfffff8000362b480, name = 0xffffffff82e62026 "amdgpu_raven_mec2_bin_fw", version = 1}
